nodes.context: Mexican American street and prison gang based in Fresno, California, involved in drug trafficking and other crimes.
Large association of Hispanic street gangs in Southern California, aligned with the Mexican Mafia.
Prison gang and organized crime syndicate in the United States, primarily active in California.
Association of Hispanic street gangs in Northern California, aligned with Nuestra Familia.
Prison gang and organized crime syndicate in the United States, primarily active in California.

edges.context: Fresno Bulldogs went to war with Norteños in 1986, known as 'The Red Wave', and remain rivals.
Fresno Bulldogs are unaffiliated with Sureños and are considered rivals.
Fresno Bulldogs are rivals with the Mexican Mafia, as stated in the infobox.
Fresno Bulldogs are rivals with Nuestra Familia, as stated in the infobox.
